description: Carrier scaffold for the G900 Observatory. Carriers are readings over the G900 body. They mark stable rails where trace may ride. This payload does not mutate the graph.

carrier_sets.label: Source provenance scaffold
carrier_sets.description: Source-provenance carrier set containing the first deterministic smoke rail.

source.claim: container only; no carrier rail geometry claimed

rails.label: Root 0:0 tuple shell depth 2
rails.description: First source-provenance smoke rail selected by bounded tuple adjacency from deterministic root vertex 0:0. This is not a force claim.

source.admissibility_note: selected from receipted G900 body tuple adjacency; no graph mutation; smoke rail only

carrier_sets.label: Slot internal carriers
carrier_sets.description: Fifteen uniform slot-internal carrier readings. Each slot carrier has 60 vertices and 120 same-slot tuple edges.

source.admissibility_note: uniform 15-slot family; each slot has 60 vertices and 120 same-slot tuple edges; no graph mutation
